title: We Provide Various Medical Directions
subtitle: Explore our main healthcare services, from family medicine and diagnostics to specialized medical care.

services.name: General Medicine
services.description: Primary consultations, checkups, follow-ups, and everyday healthcare support.

services.name: ENT
services.description: Ear, nose, and throat consultations for adults and children.

services.name: Dermatology
services.description: Skin, hair, and nail consultations with professional medical guidance.

services.name: Cardiology
services.description: Heart health consultations, monitoring, and cardiovascular care.

services.name: Gynecology
services.description: Women’s health services, preventive care, and specialized consultations.

services.name: Orthopedy
services.description: Bone, joint, muscle, and mobility care with specialist follow-up.

services.name: Endocrinology
services.description: Hormone, diabetes, thyroid, and metabolic health consultations.

services.name: Urology
services.description: Urinary and male reproductive health consultations and follow-up care.

services.name: Pediatry
services.description: Gentle medical care for children, including growth follow-ups and vaccinations.

services.name: Ophthalmology
services.description: Eye health consultations, vision checks, and ophthalmic medical guidance.

services.name: Psychotherapy
services.description: Supportive mental health care, counseling, and emotional wellbeing services.

services.name: Nutrition
services.description: Nutrition consultations, diet guidance, and healthy lifestyle support.
